text: I feel at the threshold of innovation. The glass walls and neon blue light convey a sterile, almost otherworldly sense of anticipation. The words 'R+D'—Research and Development—invite me to contemplate the nature of progress and the ceaseless pursuit of knowledge. There is wonder here, mingled with a sense of humility in the face of human creativity and technological possibility. I am both a participant and an observer, reminded that our environments are shaped by our curiosity and our desire to understand the unknown.
